meaning: n.临时房屋,帐篷,身体,壁龛,礼拜堂,神龛vt.使住于临时房屋vi.给予住宿,暂居
examples: Make a courtyard for the tabernacle.
Make all teh frames of the tabernacle in this way.
They made upright frames of acacia wood for the tabernacle.
This coed organization originated in 2001 at the Aquarian Tabernacle Church in Index, Wash.
Originally, the Opry was held downtown in the Ryman Auditorium, built in the 1890s as the Union Gospel Tabernacle.
